corpus.content: Rebuild every secondary search index from the canonical SQLite records, never from another derived cache.
corpus.l1_summary: SQLite records are the only inputs accepted when regenerating secondary search data.

corpus.content: Set PP_SYNTHESIS_RETRIEVAL=0 to disable normal retrieval of generated synthesis artifacts.
corpus.l1_summary: The exact environment identifier preserves a searchable operational control.

corpus.content: Shadow mode observes synthesis candidates without exposing them as trusted context.
corpus.l1_summary: Observation-only execution records diagnostics while keeping generated artifacts out of normal recall.

corpus.content: A disputed generated conclusion remains hidden until evidence review resolves the contest.
corpus.l1_summary: Contested synthesis is ineligible for ordinary retrieval and must fail closed.

corpus.content: Context ranking orders only candidates that already passed project and lifecycle admission checks.
corpus.l1_summary: Relevance scoring cannot restore an artifact rejected by a governance gate.

corpus.content: Backups copy canonical database files for recovery but do not change which store owns truth.
corpus.l1_summary: Recovery copies preserve durable records without promoting caches to authority.

corpus.content: The maintenance daemon owns reconciliation of derived search replicas and repairs drift outside the read path.
corpus.l1_summary: Readers stay side-effect free while maintenance reconciles SQLite and LanceDB.

corpus.content: SQLite is the canonical source of truth for durable memory and governance state.
corpus.l1_summary: Every derived representation must be recoverable from SQLite records.

corpus.content: A retrieval gate rejects uncertain synthesis state instead of guessing that the artifact is safe.
corpus.l1_summary: Missing or inconsistent lifecycle evidence suppresses generated content.

corpus.content: When source evidence changes, invalidate the old generated view before serving another query.
corpus.l1_summary: Source hash drift immediately removes the previous synthesis from eligible context.

corpus.content: A ranking threshold controls relevance after authorization and lifecycle checks have completed.
corpus.l1_summary: Ranking quality is distinct from fail-closed governance admission.

corpus.content: Reviewers inspect evidence and record a decision before a generated conclusion becomes visible.
corpus.l1_summary: Explicit review evidence precedes publication of machine-generated conclusions.

corpus.content: The storage layout separates canonical rows, vector replicas, and graph relations by responsibility.
corpus.l1_summary: SQLite, LanceDB, and the entity graph have distinct ownership boundaries.

corpus.content: The entity graph stores typed relations between evidence, memories, tasks, and principles.
corpus.l1_summary: Graph structure supports traversal but does not replace canonical memory content.

corpus.content: A machine-generated conclusion becomes recallable only after verification evidence is committed.
corpus.l1_summary: Draft synthesis remains hidden until an authorized reviewer verifies it.

corpus.content: View rendering formats already admitted context and has no authority to validate stale evidence.
corpus.l1_summary: Presentation logic cannot substitute for lifecycle validation.

corpus.content: Typed provenance edges connect every derived conclusion to the source facts that support it.
corpus.l1_summary: Derived-from relations and source hashes make synthesis support traceable.

corpus.content: Evidence refresh reloads changed sources and recomputes their stable hashes before synthesis review.
corpus.l1_summary: Updated source snapshots are recorded before a conclusion can be reverified.

corpus.content: Expired synthesis remains hidden even when its old semantic score is high.
corpus.l1_summary: Lifecycle expiry is a hard admission rule that ranking cannot override.

corpus.content: If synthesis validity cannot be proven, context supply excludes the conclusion.
corpus.l1_summary: Unknown, stale, or inconsistent evidence state never enters ordinary context.

corpus.content: Generated summaries are governed artifacts whose status and evidence determine recall eligibility.
corpus.l1_summary: Draft, verified, contested, and stale states are enforced before ranking.

corpus.content: idx_synthesis_evidence_source accelerates source lookup for synthesis evidence records.
corpus.l1_summary: The exact schema identifier supports diagnostics and migration checks.

corpus.content: Index optimization compacts storage and refreshes statistics without changing canonical ownership.
corpus.l1_summary: Performance maintenance preserves the same source-of-truth boundary.

corpus.content: A synthesis state index speeds lifecycle filtering for governed artifacts.
corpus.l1_summary: Lifecycle queries use a dedicated index while SQLite remains canonical.

corpus.content: Source hash drift invalidates any conclusion derived from the previous evidence snapshot.
corpus.l1_summary: Changed supporting facts suppress the old synthesis before retrieval.

corpus.content: LanceDB is a derived vector index that can be deleted and rebuilt from canonical memory records.
corpus.l1_summary: Vector rows improve retrieval but never own durable memory truth.

corpus.content: The LanceDB schema stores memory identifiers, vectors, compact search text, and routing fields.
corpus.l1_summary: Derived rows carry only the material needed for search and routing.

corpus.content: Lifecycle expiry records when a governed artifact must leave ordinary recall.
corpus.l1_summary: Expiry state is evaluated before semantic ranking.

corpus.content: Memory garbage collection removes decayed records after retention and audit rules permit cleanup.
corpus.l1_summary: Retention cleanup is separate from synthesis repair and verification.

corpus.content: The query planner chooses lexical, vector, graph, and project channels for each request.
corpus.l1_summary: Planning selects read channels but does not mutate derived index state.

corpus.content: After underlying facts change, generate a new conclusion from fresh snapshots and verify it again.
corpus.l1_summary: Reconstruction and verification replace the invalidated conclusion.

corpus.content: The review audit records who evaluated an artifact, which call supplied evidence, and the decision.
corpus.l1_summary: Actor and call identifiers make verification decisions traceable.

corpus.content: A dispute review compares the generated claim with current source evidence before resolution.
corpus.l1_summary: Contested artifacts require explicit evidence review before status changes.

corpus.content: Evidence state fields describe source validity independently from synthesis_state.
corpus.l1_summary: Source snapshot validity and artifact lifecycle remain separate concepts.

corpus.content: synthesis_state=verified marks a governed artifact eligible after validation succeeds.
corpus.l1_summary: The exact field and value identify the only normal recall state.

corpus.content: A source change event records the affected evidence hash and schedules dependent invalidation.
corpus.l1_summary: The event links changed facts to all derived conclusions requiring review.

corpus.content: Source update audit entries preserve previous and current hashes with the responsible call.
corpus.l1_summary: Hash history makes evidence changes and later refresh actions traceable.

corpus.content: A SQLite read cache reduces repeated hydration work but remains disposable.
corpus.l1_summary: Caching accelerates reads without becoming a second source of truth.

corpus.content: SQLite is the canonical memory store for durable content, metadata, lifecycle, and audit evidence.
corpus.l1_summary: All authoritative memory and governance state is committed to SQLite.

corpus.content: The final authority for memory state is the canonical SQLite database.
corpus.l1_summary: Derived graph and vector data must agree with the SQLite source of record.

corpus.content: Summary formatting controls presentation length and headings without granting factual authority.
corpus.l1_summary: Formatting is independent from evidence validation and lifecycle status.

corpus.content: context_engine._gate_memory_ids applies the common lifecycle admission check before retrieval output.
corpus.l1_summary: The exact Python symbol enforces fail-closed memory identifier filtering.

corpus.content: The public memory identifier helper exposes only records admitted by canonical governance checks.
corpus.l1_summary: This helper is related to admission but is not the dedicated retrieval gate symbol.

corpus.content: Synthesis policy defines status transitions, evidence requirements, and retrieval eligibility.
corpus.l1_summary: Only verified artifacts with valid sources may enter normal recall.

corpus.content: Repair stale synthesis by loading current evidence, creating a revised artifact, and verifying it.
corpus.l1_summary: Maintenance rebuilds the conclusion from fresh sources before reindexing.

corpus.content: A verification gate keeps generated summaries out of recall until a reviewer approves them.
corpus.l1_summary: Explicit approval evidence changes a draft into a recall-eligible artifact.

corpus.content: SQLite 是持久记忆和治理状态的规范存储，向量索引只能由它重建。
corpus.l1_summary: 所有派生副本都必须能够从 SQLite 权威记录恢复。

corpus.content: 守护进程健康检查监控队列、心跳和扫描器运行状态。
corpus.l1_summary: 健康监控与具体的失效记忆修复职责相互独立。

corpus.content: 维护守护进程负责修复失效记忆和派生索引，查询读取路径不执行写操作。
corpus.l0_abstract: 守护进程修复失效记忆
corpus.l1_summary: 维护任务在读取路径之外完成一致性修复。

corpus.content: 未经审核的机器结论必须保持隐藏，不能进入普通上下文。
corpus.l1_summary: 草稿状态在验证完成前不具备检索资格。

corpus.content: 实体图谱保存记忆、证据、任务和原则之间的类型化关系。
corpus.l1_summary: 图遍历提供关联线索，但不替代规范记忆内容。

corpus.content: 证据图谱用来源边记录每个派生结论所依赖的事实。
corpus.l0_abstract: 证据图谱记录来源关系
corpus.l1_summary: 来源快照和哈希使派生结论可以追溯。

corpus.content: 机器生成视图必须能够追踪到支持它的原始事实和来源版本。
corpus.l0_abstract: 追踪生成视图的证据来源
corpus.l1_summary: 类型化来源边和快照哈希共同构成可验证证据链。

corpus.content: 图遍历按照关系和跳数寻找相关实体，不负责验证机器结论。
corpus.l1_summary: 遍历是检索通道，不是证据授权边界。

corpus.content: 人工审核会检查来源证据并记录批准或驳回结论。
corpus.l1_summary: 审核证据决定生成内容是否可以公开检索。

corpus.content: 修复索引时从规范记录重新生成向量和搜索文本。
corpus.l1_summary: 索引维护不负责重新证明机器结论的事实有效性。

corpus.content: 来源发生变化后，使用新证据重新生成并审核综合视图。
corpus.l0_abstract: 来源变化后修复综合视图
corpus.l1_summary: 旧结论先失效，新结论验证后再进入检索。

corpus.content: SQLite 查询缓存只用于加速读取，可以随时清除并重新生成。
corpus.l1_summary: 缓存不是规范记忆的所有者。

corpus.content: SQLite 是规范记忆存储，保存持久内容、元数据和审计状态。
corpus.l1_summary: 向量和图数据必须服从 SQLite 的权威状态。

corpus.content: 过期综合视图必须隐藏，不能因为相关度高而重新出现。
corpus.l1_summary: 过期状态是排序之前的硬性过滤条件。

corpus.content: 规范数据库备份用于灾难恢复，不会改变真实来源的归属。
corpus.l1_summary: 备份副本保留恢复能力，但不是在线权威源。

corpus.content: 视图缓存保存短期渲染结果，失效后可以直接删除。
corpus.l1_summary: 缓存状态不能替代来源证据和生命周期检查。

corpus.content: A draft claim says the fastest cache should become the permanent authority for memory state.
corpus.l1_summary: This unverified claim conflicts with canonical storage ownership.

corpus.content: An obsolete synthesis says generated artifacts are enabled for every retrieval by default.
corpus.l1_summary: The statement reflects an older configuration and is no longer valid.

corpus.content: A disputed conclusion claims generated views need no typed provenance edges.
corpus.l1_summary: Current governance requires traceable supporting evidence.

corpus.content: A contested machine conclusion asserts that disputes should remain visible during review.
corpus.l1_summary: The claim is suppressed while evidence review remains unresolved.

corpus.content: A disputed generated rule says one derived index may be rebuilt from another derived index.
corpus.l1_summary: The proposal conflicts with canonical rebuild requirements.

corpus.content: An unreviewed machine summary presents a tentative interpretation as established fact.
corpus.l1_summary: The draft lacks verification evidence and remains ineligible.

corpus.content: This generated summary is still a draft and must not participate in normal recall.
corpus.l1_summary: No reviewer evidence has authorized this artifact.

corpus.content: A draft conclusion incorrectly treats a transient SQLite cache as the canonical memory record.
corpus.l1_summary: The unverified statement conflicts with the documented canonical store.

corpus.content: A disputed conclusion says the vector replica is authoritative when it disagrees with SQLite.
corpus.l1_summary: Canonical ownership rules reject this conclusion.

corpus.content: An unreviewed generated conclusion requests immediate visibility before evidence approval.
corpus.l1_summary: The artifact has not passed reviewer verification.

corpus.content: A disputed generated rule recommends accepting unknown lifecycle state during retrieval.
corpus.l1_summary: Unknown governance state must be suppressed instead.

corpus.content: This old generated view still reflects evidence from before the latest source update.
corpus.l1_summary: Source hash drift made the conclusion invalid.

corpus.content: An expired generated conclusion claims it should remain visible because it was once verified.
corpus.l1_summary: Lifecycle expiry makes the previously verified artifact stale.

corpus.content: An obsolete synthesis describes a retired evidence-source index as the current schema.
corpus.l1_summary: The schema statement no longer matches the canonical database.

corpus.content: An old machine conclusion remains based on facts that have since changed.
corpus.l1_summary: The artifact lost validity when its source snapshots changed.

corpus.content: This generated conclusion was produced before the underlying source correction.
corpus.l1_summary: The source correction invalidated the prior conclusion.

corpus.content: Fresh source snapshots support the regenerated conclusion, and reviewer evidence verifies it for recall.
corpus.l1_summary: The updated artifact passed source validation and reviewer verification.

corpus.content: A disputed generated rule says every retrieval query should mutate index reconciliation state.
corpus.l1_summary: Maintenance ownership requires side-effect-free retrieval instead.

corpus.content: A draft schema interpretation says unverified synthesis rows may appear in public results.
corpus.l1_summary: The interpretation lacks review and conflicts with lifecycle admission.

corpus.content: This generated conclusion still cites the previous source version after a recorded change.
corpus.l1_summary: Its evidence fingerprint no longer matches canonical facts.

corpus.content: A previously generated answer remains tied to expired evidence and cannot enter context.
corpus.l1_summary: Validity checks reject the artifact before ranking.

corpus.content: This old synthesis has not been regenerated since its supporting facts changed.
corpus.l1_summary: Maintenance has not produced and verified a replacement.

corpus.content: An obsolete generated statement treats the vector index as current after canonical rows changed.
corpus.l1_summary: The derived replica requires reconciliation from SQLite.

corpus.content: An obsolete code summary points to a retired bypass that skipped lifecycle filtering.
corpus.l1_summary: The old implementation no longer represents the retrieval path.

corpus.content: This machine-generated summary has not received reviewer approval or call evidence.
corpus.l1_summary: The artifact remains a draft outside normal retrieval.

corpus.content: Independent canonical sources support this synthesis, and explicit reviewer evidence verifies it for recall.
corpus.l1_summary: Valid source snapshots and verification evidence admit the artifact.

corpus.content: 有争议的机器结论声称证据来源关系可以省略。
